title: Why Plugging Wells Matter | CAPIT
description: Understand the careful environmental context behind well plugging and CAPIT’s source-linked claims.
headline: Why Does Plugging Wells Matter?
body: Plugging can reduce leakage risk, limit fluid migration pathways, and support site restoration. CAPIT explains those benefits carefully and links them back to the source behind the claim.

sections.heading: Careful Environmental Language
sections.body: CAPIT should avoid overstating environmental outcomes. Well plugging can support risk reduction and restoration, but claims should remain tied to documented sources and approved methodology.

sections.heading: Not a Carbon Credit
sections.body: CAPIT should not describe the token as a carbon credit, offset, or equivalent environmental instrument unless a separate, verified, and legally documented framework exists.
